reviews.comment:
Los baños de mujeres muy sucio, y los de hombre ni hablemos.

(Translated by Google)
The women's restrooms are very dirty, and the men's restrooms are even worse.

reviews.comment:
Falta de personal en la parte full, había solo una persona atendiendo y un montón de gente esperando!!!

(Translated by Google)
There was a lack of staff in the full area; there was only one person serving and a lot of people waiting!

reviews.comment:
Dos playeros para atender 6 filas de autos no es suficiente. Más de 30 minutos de espera para poder cargar.

(Translated by Google)
Two attendants to serve six rows of cars is not enough. More than 30 minutes of waiting to charge.

reviews.comment:
Como es costumbre en nuestro país: no se mantienen limpios los baños. Me extraña que el ACA no preste un servicio tan esencial.

As is typical in our country: the restrooms aren't kept clean. I'm surprised the ACA doesn't provide such an essential service.
